allow: Bash(python -c "import json,urllib.request; TOKEN=''18b7ba53e343ec809d939eeb93fc806e560f01a1''; r=urllib.request.urlopen\(urllib.request.Request\(''https://api.todoist.com/api/v1/tasks'',headers={''Authorization'':''Bearer ''+TOKEN}\)\); data=json.loads\(r.read\(\)\); tasks=data.get\(''results'',data\) if isinstance\(data,dict\) else data; print\(len\(tasks\), list\(tasks[0].keys\(\)\) if tasks else ''empty''\)")

Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM pythonw.exe & taskkill /F /IM python.exe & echo done")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CommandLine")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python,pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N=''CMD'';E={\($_.MainModule.FileName\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object {\($_.Name -like ''python*''\)} | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""CommandLine LIKE ''%bot_trigger%''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process pythonw,python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""CommandLine LIKE ''%bot_trigger.py%''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -notin @\(11280,11340,11348,11476,11616,11920,11972,12204,12224,12256,12692,12736\)} | Select-Object Id")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''pythonw.exe''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -eq 80104} | Select-Object Id,CPU")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-5\) | Select-Object Id,CPU,StartTime")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Id -eq 37420 | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_Id -gt 30000} | Select-Object Id,CPU")
